title: Downtown Uncorked Jazz Jam
notes: Our group just forming at this point. Ryan and Sean weren't involved, It was just Will, McIan, Brent, and Eddie at this event.'
description: McIan: I distinctly remember Brent ripping the Brent note that night though, because it was the last time Tivis let his ass play hahaha. Tivis was not fond of Brent hahaha. I remember him talking to me some other night when I was playing with his Dixie land band and he was like “don't bring that guy around” haha

title: Busking
notes: March 16 - March 21. We were there with Hullabaloo for the 2010 NCAA Division I women's basketball tournament.
description: McIan, Will, Eddie (and Bog?) on a street corner in Seattle, WA jamming Real Book tunes.

title: Burger Boy Expo
notes: The first official of the Conglomerate. This was expo for local musical acts. Each performer was given a 15 minute set. We were so good, they let us play for almost an hour.
description: possibly billed as a Hip Hop night?

title: OCCUPY CHURCH STREET
description: Research indicates that 1% of College Station is in control of 99% of the FUNK. WE ARE THE 1% and we're gonna take it right to Church Street to distribute the wealth. Be ye a Getuplican or a Downocrat, come join us to rally behind the funk and the groove that this nation was founded upon.

title: Rock The Republic (Syndicate)
notes: Night of 2011-11-12. Famously a certain bass player went to the green room got into the Buffalo Trace and got too drunk to even stand in between the two sets - But despite my anxieties he knocked the syndicate gig out of the park.

title: Live Band Night at Velocity feat. The Conglomerate
description: Featuring our good friend Hippy Joe

title: The Conglomerate Hot & Ready!
description: The Conglomerate is gonna be getting Hot AND Ready Friday night making it's big return to the one and only Church St. Blues and BBQ! Come early and imbibe a few with the band and stay for THE FUNK!. For the first time ever, official Conglomerate 8oz mustachioed flasks will be available for sale at the show, $10!

title: The Conglomerate w/ Cube

title: The Conglomerate
description: Are you stuck in College Station? Do you wish your face could be melted by sheer funk power tonight around 10? Well, you're in luck! The Conglomerate is here too, and we're playing at Church Street Blues and BBQ tonight! Come out and groove!

title: CSBBQ 2nd Anniversary Party
description: It's been two years already! Come dressed in your best party pants, cause this one is gonna be the biggest yet! We'll have the pit cooking overtime, the bar overstocked, and the PA cranked to 11. Open mic will start at 5 and go to 8, then we've got Jimmy Jones and Nick Verzosa on their acoustics until 9. The Conglomerate (with some special guests) will start the face melting at 9:30, followed by Tyler Brown at 11. JT Coldfire is here to round things out at 12; if you haven't seen him before, you haven't lived. We all know that you've got the 4th off, so if you love America you'll come celebrate your freedom with the best Blues, Brews and BBQ around!

title: The Conglomerate & Hazy Ray
description: Got plans tonight? Cancel those hoes, our friends Hazy Ray are playing at Church Street Blues and BBQ at 10:30! GET THERE

title: The Conglomerate at Church Street BBQ
description: LAST MINUTE HEADS UP! The Conglomerate boys are back in town and we're hot n' ready to throw down at Church St. TONIGHT!
notes: Will can out of retirement to drum this show. THere was a thunderstorm, we played anyway.

title: The Conglomerate Presents: FUNK BEACHES, GET MONEY!
description: Beach season is over? So is Gig'em Week?? HELL NAH, let's kick school off on the good foot with some serious funk at Church ST. BBQ this Saturday!

title: Space Capone w/ Soul Track Mind & The Conglomerate live at Grand Stafford Theater
description: FUNK IS IT'S OWN REWARD

title: LSU @ Texas A&M - Hazy Ray & The Conglomerate in College Station
description: Tigers and Aggies, join us for an amazing night of entertainment after the game out at Church St. Blues and BBQ at the edge of North Gate in College Station. Church St. has the best BBQ in the city, great drink/beer specials, and is THE live music venue in College Station. Join us as Hazy Ray teams up with its favorite College Station jam band the Conglomerate!

title: THE FUNK OF FORTY THOUSAND YEARS
notes: On a Wednesday night
description: The Conglomerate will bring THE FUNK OF FORTY THOUSAND YEARS to you tonight at Church Street Blues and BBQ! THERE WILL BE FUNK SO HARD THAT IT WAKES THE DEAD

title: A FREE CONCERT & JAM SESSION by Sisi Berry, The Conglomerate & friends at Grand Stafford Theater
description: Come out and hear from some great Bryan/College Station locals rocking out and jamming all night long from 9pm - 1am! Don't miss it, no cover, cheap drinks, great specials!

title: END OF THE WORLD PARTY - FREE CONCERT!
description:
'GREATEST PARTY TO EVER HIT AGGIELAND...EVER!' - Dr. Loftin
Finals are over. The world is going to end. How are you going to enjoy your last few days in Aggieland?

title: End of the semester party/Jam session
First Friday with Larynx Music
notes: Featured The Conglomerate & Taz & Company.
description: First Friday in Historic Downtown Bryan, Texas is happening THIS Friday night, check out what we have in store for you all and make plans to attend a great night of local music, great jams & be sure to bring your dancing shoes for this one! Larynx Music will be headlining along with special guests The Conglomerate who will get your feet moving and hips shaking along with their funk with locals HI FI who will blend their rock & blues for you to move around. The night will get started with Taz & Company performing some great acoustic arrangements for you for FREE from 7-8pm. Doors open at 6pm, get there early & stay late! Tell a friend.

title: The Conglomerate Live @ Cedar Lane
description: You do not want to miss tonight! We hear the Hullabaloo Kid himself might be making a special vocal appearance...

title: THE BRAIN POLICE
notes: Featuring members past and present of The Conglomerate, performing all of your favorite classic rock tunes from bands such as Led Zeppelin, Frank Zappa, and Queen
description: In celebration, we have provided thee not only with a most funktastic visit from the Doctors of Funkitelicy themselves, THE CONGLOMERATE on Saturday, but also from a collection of CONGLOMERATE members who wish to provide thee with an extra good time on Friday as well. THEY SHALL BE KNOWN AS THE BRAIN POLICE.

title: CONGLOMOWEEKEND EXTRAVAGANZA!!!
notes: the majestic reopening of Church Street Blues and BBQ on Northgate, our favorite venue in the entire omniverse is back in business.
description: Indeed, also, our dear friend Alex B Long has a birthday celebration on 4/20. TO CELEBRATE, THE CONGLOMERATE HAS DECIDED TO INVADE AND VIOLATE HIS SOVEREIGNTY. NORTH CONGLOMERATE IS BEST CONGLOMERATE.

title: The Conglomerate Presents: The CONGLOMERATION (LAST EVER CHURCH STREET SHOW)
notes: Last ever church street show.
description:
Funk upon a time, It was said that all good things must come to pass.
Indeed, it is also said that what we do in life echoes in eternity.
Soon, the world will know another essential life-changing truth as we discover:
IS THERE FUNK AFTER DEATH?
People of College Station, Texas, USA, North America, World, Universe, 'Murica, this is THE END.
The Conglomerate- your favorite band in the whole world, and the undisputed heavyweight champion of FUNK- is going to die an unfortunately sad and excruciatingly painful death at the hands of every great American college band's worst nightmare: GRADUATION. Long have we fought hard against this foe (some of us far harder than others...). But much like death and taxes, our fate, as is yours, is inevitable.
We members of the Conglomerate ask thee all to join us for one LAST night at Church Street Blues and BBQ, as we bring you the funk for 4 solid, sweaty, drunken hours ONE LAST TIME before the graduation reaper takes our funk away.
We, being the humble and gracious elected leaders of funk in this very special part of the world, also have painstakingly crafted a very special setlist in mind to ensure a good time for all of our constituents.
To all of our friends past and present, this will be the last opportunity to funk out with us before the professional world steals our SOUL away. We would absolutely LOVE to see you.
So please, Come out one and all to the last 4 hour funk marathon from your triple-board certified doctors of funkiteliky themselves, THE CONGLOMERATE!


Disclaimer: We are THE CONGLOMERATE! We stand for nothing and break for no one.
